lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: The medicine store is already closed at this hour.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Theres nothing you need to do here yet.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: Hi sweetie what do you need?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Hmmm. Nothing really.

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: Are you lost?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: What? No! Im old enough to know how to get home!

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: Alright, alright, Im just asking.

choices.text: Sorry. I didnt mean to lash out like that.
Im 14 lady. I kow I dont look like it but im not dumb.
Are you lost? Do you need help getting back to the nursing home?

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: Its okay. We all have bad days. Ive certainly had plenty recently.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah? what happened?

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: Im not sure you need to hear this.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Sometimes its good to talk abou things with strangers no? Gives you more freedom without caring about what theyre gonna think about you.

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: Youre definitely right its just that youre pretty young for my kind of problems you know.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: The lady laughs nervously

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Well you dont have to tell me. Just hang in there, we all go through tough times.

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: Thank you sweetie. I definitely will.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: She smiles at you

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: Wow. You young people are all the same.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: At least we mind our own damn business.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Excuse me. My neighbor sent me to pick up his medicine. I have the recipe here.

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: Let me see...

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: She smiles as you hand her the recipe

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: Okay, wait here a second honey.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: The lady walks away for a minute and comes back with the medicine

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: That will be 11$ please.

choices.text: Would you be willing to trade something for that?

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You hand her the money

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: Thank you young man.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You thank her as well as you start walking away.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Suddenly she stops you

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: Wait a second. Are you still interested in hearing about-

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: well..about what you asked earlier?

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: This part of the game is not finished yet.

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: Well then sorry honey but I cant give you the medicine.

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: Did your neighbor not give you the money upfront?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Uuuh...Its kinda complicated.

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: He didnt give you any?!

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: What kind of a man sends a boy to fetch him his medicine and doesnt even give him the money?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Cant I just take the medicine and tell him to come and pay?

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: Im sorry but no. Go back to him and tell him to come himself and with money next time.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Yeah, save to say that wont work.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah ill definitely do that.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You walk away cursing to yourself.

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: Sweet boy..

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: I really cant help you here Im sorry. If you dont have the money go back to your neigbor and ask it. Its reasonable that he should give you it.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Yeah, save to say that wont work.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah ill definitely do that.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You walk away cursing to yourself.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Excuse me. My neighbor sent me to pick up his medicine. I have the recipe here.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: The lady gives you a look that makes you shiver a bit

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: Let me see...

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You hand her the recipe

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: Okay, wait here a second.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: The lady walks away for a minute and comes back with the medicine

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: That will be 11$.

choices.text: Would you be willing to trade something for that?

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You hand her the money

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You awkwardly thank her as you start walking away.

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: boy..

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You can feel that her patience is running out.

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: I dont have time for games. If you dont have the money go get some.

lines.speaker: med_lady
lines.text: And stop wasting my time.
